generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our city's emergency response time dropped 15% last quarter because of outdated surveillance protocols. The new security bill would fix this by giving first responders real-time data access. Some worry about privacy, but when seconds count, shouldn't we prioritize saving lives? #PublicSafetyFirst #ModernizeForSafety
